examples: The first female troupe (剧团) of Yue opera was created in 1923, and then female performers gradually took the place of the males.
The dancing troupe will give three performances at the Century Theatre.
O Troupe of little vagrants of the world, leave your footprints in my words.
Zhovie, founded in 2004, is a street theatre troupe of 14 actors and three percussionists.
It was the first time the cold had killed a whole troupe in one go.
